reported_entities.name: ASUS (華碩電腦股份有限公司 / ASUSTeK Computer Inc.)
reported_entities.claim: Official Taiwan site for ASUS, the Taiwanese multinational computer hardware and consumer electronics company. Official English name: ASUSTeK Computer Inc. (commonly referred to as ASUS).

reported_entities.name: ASUS華碩官方旗艦店 (Shopee)
reported_entities.claim: Official ASUS storefront on Shopee Taiwan, corroborating the ASUS/華碩 identity mapping.

reported_entities.name: ASUS華碩 (PChome 24h)
reported_entities.claim: ASUS product category page on PChome 24h, further corroborating 華碩 = ASUS.

notes: Single Salva run (find_companies, market=Taiwan, industry=consumer electronics/computer hardware, extra_keywords=['華碩']) returned 4 qualified entities, all resolving unambiguously to ASUS: official asus.com/tw pages (top confidence 0.4006) plus retail marketplace listings explicitly labeled 'ASUS華碩' on PChome and 'ASUS華碩官方旗艦店' on Shopee. No WebSearch needed — Salva's cross-lingual resolution (華碩 -> ASUS) was unambiguous and consistent across all returned sources. OMLX embedding service was unavailable (connection refused, expected fallback) but retrieval_health still reported 'ok' via fallback path.
